title: Cauldron++
description: Cauldron++ is a mod which implements b1.9-pre2 brewing system back to modern Minecraft.
body:
# Cauldron++ Cauldron++ is a mod which implements b1.9-pre2 brewing system back into modern Minecraft.  
## Features ### New block: Cauldron(Legacy) - Can hold water, lava, potion, colored water(for dyeing leather armors) and powder snow(only 1.18+) - Cauldron with lava will emits light level 15 and hurt player inside. - Cauldron with snow will freeze player inside. - You can brew potion by placing water in the cauldron first, and right click the cauldron with brewing materials. - Using different material with water/potion cauldron can brew different potions or change potion type. - Available brewing material(originally in b1.9p2): Nether wart, Blaze powder, Spider eye, Fermented spider eye, Ghast tear, Sugar, Magma cream - Available brewing material(added by this mod): Phantom membrane, Glowstone dust, Redstone dust, Slime ball, Chorus fruit, Golden carrot, Rabbit foot, Golden melon(converting to normal potion), Gunpowder(converting to splash potion), Dragon breath(converting to lingering potion). - Right click with glass bottle on water/potion cauldron to get water bottle/potion. - Right click with arrows more than 16 on potion cauldron to get tipped arrow, one level of potion can give you 16 tipped arrows. - Cauldron with colored water works basically same with Bedrock edition cauldrons. - Other features(e.g. interaction with dripstone, behavior in rain/snow) work basically same with vanilla cauldrons. ### New item: Potion, Splash potion, Lingering potion, Tipped arrow - Lingering potion & Tipped arrow requires to enable manually in the config file in 1.7.10 - Can stack up to 64. - Other features works the same as vanilla. ### New item: Water bottle - Can stack up to 64. - Cannot use in vanilla brewing stands. - Now right clicking on water will get this item instead of the vanilla water bottle.
## Q&A Q: Why make this mod? A: I just thought this system is interesting, so i made it to bring it back. Q: Will there be other versions? A: Currently only planning on Fabric 1.16.5, 1.21.8, 1.21.10, 1.21.11
## License This mod is open sourced under GPL-v3.0 and CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0. (c) 2025 redColmula55
